paper_title: New Approach to Separate and Date Small Spores and Pollen from Lake Sediments in Semi-Arid Climates

methods.description: Process for collecting sediment cores from Lake Van to study pollen and spore composition and dating.

steps.description: Sediment cores were drilled at the Ahlat Ridge in the western part of Lake Van in 2004.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment cores from Lake Van using a piston corer

steps.description: A composite profile with a maximum length of approximately 9 m was constructed from the Van04-2 sediment cores, based on magnetic susceptibility and 16 distinctive volcanic ash deposits.
steps.searchable_summary: construct composite sediment profile using magnetic susceptibility and volcanic ash deposits

methods.description: Procedure for sampling sediment layers from Lake Van for pollen concentration analysis.

steps.description: A total of 11 sediment samples were used in this study, focused in Holocene sediments.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment samples from Holocene layers

steps.description: The sediment samples were taken directly above and below five volcanic ash layers (V-1, V-2, V-3b, V-6, and V-7).
steps.searchable_summary: sample sediment layers around volcanic ash markers
outputs: sediment samples with volcanic ash markers
